# cloudflare_custom_page_asset (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "cloudflare_custom_page_asset" "example_custom_page_asset" {
  description = "Custom 500 error page"
  name = "my_custom_error_page"
  url = "https://example.com/error.html"
  zone_id = "zone_id"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `description` (String) A short description of the custom asset.
- `name` (String) The unique name of the custom asset. Can only contain letters (A-Z, a-z), numbers (0-9), and underscores (_).
- `url` (String) The URL where the asset content is fetched from.

### Optional

- `account_id` (String) The Account ID to use for this endpoint. Mutually exclusive with the Zone ID.
- `zone_id` (String) The Zone ID to use for this endpoint. Mutually exclusive with the Account ID.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique name of the custom asset. Can only contain letters (A-Z, a-z), numbers (0-9), and underscores (_).
- `last_updated` (String)
- `size_bytes` (Number) The size of the asset content in bytes.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
$ terraform import cloudflare_custom_page_asset.example '<{accounts|zones}/{account_id|zone_id}>/<asset_name>'
```
